title: HP JetDirect PJL - Interactive Query Shell / File Exfiltration
description: Provides an interactive PJL command shell against HP JetDirect printers on port 9100. Allows arbitrary PJL command execution: directory listing, file download (FSUPLOAD), file upload (FSDOWNLOAD), variable inspection and modification.
author: Myo Soe (YGN Ethical Hacker Group)
